info:
Refresh snapshot canchón cada 5 min.

ESTRATEGIA: TRUNCATE + INSERT (sin histórico, sin watermark).
Solo trae camiones actualmente en canchón (estado='A', sin salida, últimos 2 días).

Destino: production.canchon_snapshot
Vistas para consultar: production.v_canchon_resumen + production.v_camiones_canchon

Requiere config nodes 'mssql-corona' y 'pg-supabase'.

name: CTA CTE CAÑEROS
query:
WITH datos_muestreo AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id_caniero, 
        t.razon_social, 
        t.peso_neto AS neto,
        ISNULL(t.azucarcaniertoneto, 0) + ISNULL(t.devengado2, 0) AS devengado_total,
        ISNULL(t.azucarcaniertoneto, 0) AS dev_v1,
        ISNULL(t.devengado2, 0) AS dev_v2,
        RIGHT(t.fechaindustrial, 4) AS ZAFRA,
        f.fecha AS fechafiltro,
        f.idcaniero2
    FROM dbo.pr_ezi_muestralab3 t
    INNER JOIN dbo.pr_ezi_filtro_ec f 
        ON RIGHT(t.fechaindustrial, 4) + SUBSTRING(t.fechaindustrial, 4, 2) + LEFT(t.fechaindustrial, 2) <= f.fecha
),
datos_ordenes AS (
    SELECT 
        o.id_caniero, 
        o.firma AS razon_social,
        o.zafra AS ZAFRA,
        f.fecha AS fechafiltro,
        f.idcaniero2,
        o.cantidad AS ord_emitidas_v1
    FROM dbo.pr_ezi_ordenes_azucar o
    INNER JOIN dbo.pr_ezi_filtro_ec f 
        ON RIGHT(o.fecha, 4) + SUBSTRING(o.fecha, 4, 2) + LEFT(o.fecha, 2) <= f.fecha AND o.zafra = f.zafra
    WHERE o.estado <> N'Anulada' AND (o.autorizada = N'S' OR o.autorizada IS NULL) AND tipoorden IS NULL
),
ctacte AS (
    SELECT 
        id_caniero, razon_social, 
        SUM(neto) AS neto, 
        ROUND(SUM(devengado_total) / 50, 0) AS devengado,
        ROUND(SUM(dev_v1) / 50, 0) AS dev_v1,
        ROUND(SUM(dev_v2) / 50, 0) AS dev_v2,
        ZAFRA, 
        fechafiltro, 
        idcaniero2,
        0 AS ord_emitidas_v1
    FROM datos_muestreo
    GROUP BY id_caniero, razon_social, ZAFRA, fechafiltro, idcaniero2
),
ordenes_azucar AS (
    SELECT 
        id_caniero, razon_social, 
        0 AS neto, 
        0 AS devengado, 
        0 AS dev_v1,
        0 AS dev_v2,
        ZAFRA, 
        fechafiltro, 
        idcaniero2, 
        SUM(ord_emitidas_v1) AS ord_emitidas_v1
    FROM datos_ordenes
    GROUP BY id_caniero, razon_social, ZAFRA, fechafiltro, idcaniero2
),
EC AS (
    SELECT * FROM ctacte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM ordenes_azucar
)
SELECT 
    EC.razon_social AS caniero,
    g.GRUPO,
    SUM(EC.neto) AS cania_bruta,
    SUM(EC.devengado) AS bls_totales_dev,
    SUM(EC.dev_v1) AS bls_dev_v1,
    SUM(EC.dev_v2) AS bls_dev_v2,
    SUM(EC.ord_emitidas_v1) AS ord_emitidas_v1,
    0 AS saldozafraanterior,
    SUM(EC.dev_v1 - EC.ord_emitidas_v1) AS saldobolsas_v1,
    EC.ZAFRA,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, STUFF(STUFF(EC.fechafiltro, 5, 0, '-'), 8, 0, '-')), 103) AS fechafiltro
FROM EC
INNER JOIN dbo.v_pr_grupos g ON EC.id_caniero = g.idcaniero
INNER JOIN dbo.pr_ezi_filtro_ec f ON EC.ZAFRA = f.zafra
GROUP BY 
    EC.id_caniero, EC.razon_social, EC.ZAFRA, 
    EC.fechafiltro, g.GRUPO, EC.idcaniero2, f.grupo
ORDER BY EC.ZAFRA, EC.razon_social;

name: Preparar INSERT para MySQL
CONSUMO POR HORA
query:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial) as fechaindustrial,
    COALESCE(k.HORA, g.hora, h.hora, e.hora) as hora,
    COALESCE(g.kilos, 0) as gas,
    COALESCE(k.KILOS, 0) as kilos,
    COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) as humedad,
    COALESCE(e.bolsas, 0) as bolsas
FROM 
    (SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, HORA
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Molienda' 
    ) AS base
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Molienda' 
    ) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = k.HORA
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(kilos, 0) as kilos
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Gas' 
    ) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = g.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) as humedad
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Bagazo' 
    ) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = h.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, 
            (LEFT([HORA], 2)+':00') AS hora, 
            SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) as bolsas
     FROM [CORONA].[dbo].[pr_ezi_especiales2]
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
     GROUP BY fechaindustrial, (LEFT([HORA], 2)+':00')
    ) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = e.hora
WHERE RIGHT(COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial),4) = YEAR(GETDATE())
ORDER BY fechaindustrial DESC, hora DESC;

name: Preparar INSERT para MySQL
PARADAS
Preparar INSERT para MySQL
DATOS_PROCESO_HORA
query:
SELECT TOP 3000  
	(SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 7, 4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 4, 2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 1, 2)) AS fechaindustrial,
    b.hora,
    MAX(CASE WHEN b.codigoproceso = 'Bagazo' THEN b.polautomatico END) AS pol_bagazo,
    MAX(CASE WHEN b.codigoproceso = 'Cachaza' THEN b.polautomatico END) AS pol_cachaza
FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2 b
WHERE b.codigoproceso IN ('Bagazo', 'Cachaza')
  AND b.fechaindustrial IS NOT NULL 
  AND b.hora IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY b.fechaindustrial, b.hora
ORDER BY 
    SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 7, 4) DESC,
    SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 4, 2) DESC,
    SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 1, 2) DESC, 
    b.hora DESC;

Color, Turbidez, ROUND(Humedad*100,2) as Humedad, ROUND(Cenizas*100,2) as Cenizas, Granulometria_20,Granulometria_30, Sediment_Test AS sedimento, SO2

query:
select id, codigoproceso, (SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 4, 2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 1, 2)) AS fecharegistro, HORA,
Color, Turbidez, ROUND(Humedad*100,2) as Humedad, ROUND(Cenizas*100,2) as Cenizas, Gran_20,Gran_30, Sedim_Test AS sedimento, SO2

let moliendaTotal = `
-- Crear tabla temporal común para almacenar los resultados intermedios de varios años
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TempMolienda') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #TempMolienda;

CREATE TABLE #TempMolienda (
    parte INT,
    codigoproceso VARCHAR(20),
    diario DECIMAL(18, 2),
    fechaindustrial DATE,
    anio INT
);

-- Insertar los datos del año 2024
INSERT INTO #TempMolienda (parte, codigoproceso, diario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2024 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 150;  -- Limitar días para 2024

-- Insertar los datos del año 2023
INSERT INTO #TempMolienda (parte, codigoproceso, diario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2023' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2023 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2023-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 186;  -- Limitar días para 2023

-- Insertar los datos del año 2022
INSERT INTO #TempMolienda (parte, codigoproceso, diario, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2022 AS anio
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL
    AND (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) <= 147;  -- Limitar días para 2022

-- Seleccionar los datos con el acumulado separado por año
SELECT 
    parte,
    codigoproceso,
    diario,
    (SELECT SUM(t2.diario) 
     FROM #TempMolienda t2
     WHERE t2.fechaindustrial <= t1.fechaindustrial
     AND t2.anio = t1.anio  -- Acumulado solo para el mismo año
    ) AS acumulado,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), t1.fechaindustrial, 101) AS fechaindustrial,
    t1.anio
FROM 
    #TempMolienda t1
ORDER BY parte ASC, codigoproceso ASC;

-- Eliminar la tabla temporal
DROP TABLE #TempMolienda;
`;

    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2023 AS anio
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2023-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2023
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial;

-- Insertar los datos del año 2022
INSERT INTO #TempColor (parte, codigoproceso, color, fechaindustrial, anio)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2022-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Color Azucar 2022' AS codigoproceso,
    ROUND(AVG(Color), 2) AS color,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    2022 AS anio
FROM 
    pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE 
    codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2022-05-16'
    AND YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2022
    AND Color IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    fechaindustrial;

-- Seleccionar los datos con el acumulado discriminado por año
SELECT 
    parte,
    codigoproceso,
    color,
    (SELECT SUM(t2.color)
     FROM #TempColor t2
     WHERE t2.fechaindustrial <= t1.fechaindustrial
     AND t2.anio = t1.anio  -- Acumulado solo para el mismo año
    ) AS acumulado,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), t1.fechaindustrial, 101) AS fechaindustrial,
    t1.anio
FROM 
    #TempColor t1
ORDER BY 
    t1.anio ASC, parte ASC;

-- Eliminar la tabla temporal
DROP TABLE #TempColor;
`;

return msg;

name: Molienda Acumulada Total (SQL)
func:
let moliendaAyer = `
-- Crear tabla temporal para almacenar resultados intermedios
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TempMolienda') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #TempMolienda;

CREATE TABLE #TempMolienda (
    parte INT,
    codigoproceso VARCHAR(20),
    diario DECIMAL(18, 2),
    fechaindustrial DATE
);

-- Insertar los datos en la tabla temporal
INSERT INTO #TempMolienda (parte, codigoproceso, diario, fechaindustrial)
SELECT 
    (DATEDIFF(day, '2024-05-16', CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) + 1) AS parte,
    'Molienda 2024' AS codigoproceso,
    (molienda) / 1000 AS diario,
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    [CORONA].[dbo].[v_pr_informe_general]
WHERE 
    YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103)) = 2024 
    AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) >= '2024-05-16'
    AND gasnor IS NOT NULL;

-- Seleccionar resultados con acumulado
SELECT 
    parte,
    codigoproceso,
    diario,
    (SELECT SUM(t2.diario) 
     FROM #TempMolienda t2
     WHERE t2.fechaindustrial <= t1.fechaindustrial
    ) AS acumulado,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), t1.fechaindustrial, 101) AS fechaindustrial
FROM 
    #TempMolienda t1
ORDER BY parte ASC;

-- Eliminar la tabla temporal
DROP TABLE #TempMolienda;
`
;

msg.payload = moliendaAyer;  // Asigna la consulta SQL al payload

return msg;

name: Molienda_Laboratrio-MMSQL
func:
let Consuslta = `
SELECT 
    COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial) AS fechaindustrial,
    COALESCE(k.HORA, g.hora, h.hora, e.hora) AS hora,
    COALESCE(g.kilos, 0) AS gas,
    COALESCE(k.KILOS, 0) AS kilos,
    COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) AS humedad,
    COALESCE(e.bolsas, 0) AS bolsas
FROM 
    (SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
    ) AS base
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
    ) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = k.HORA
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(kilos, 0) AS kilos
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
    ) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = g.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) AS humedad
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
    ) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = h.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, 
            LEFT(HORA,2) + ':00' AS hora, 
            SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) AS bolsas
     FROM pr_ezi_especiales2
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
     GROUP BY fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA,2) + ':00'
    ) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = e.hora
WHERE RIGHT(
        COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial),
        4
      ) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS CHAR(4))
ORDER BY fechaindustrial DESC, hora DESC;
`;

msg.payload = Consuslta;

return msg;

name: CONSUMO POR HORA
query:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial) as fechaindustrial,
    COALESCE(k.HORA, g.hora, h.hora, e.hora) as hora,
    COALESCE(g.kilos, 0) as gas,
    COALESCE(k.KILOS, 0) as kilos,
    COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) as humedad,
    COALESCE(e.bolsas, 0) as bolsas
FROM 
    (SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, HORA
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Molienda' 
    ) AS base
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Molienda' 
    ) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = k.HORA
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(kilos, 0) as kilos
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Gas' 
    ) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = g.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) as humedad
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Bagazo' 
    ) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = h.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, 
            (LEFT([HORA], 2)+':00') AS hora, 
            SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) as bolsas
     FROM [CORONA].[dbo].[pr_ezi_especiales2]
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
     GROUP BY fechaindustrial, (LEFT([HORA], 2)+':00')
    ) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = e.hora
WHERE RIGHT(COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial),4) = YEAR(GETDATE())
ORDER BY fechaindustrial DESC, hora DESC;

name: Preparar INSERT para MySQL
Molienda Ultima Hora (Laboratorio)
func:
let molienda = `
SELECT 
*
FROM 
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
          AND ISDATE(fechaindustrial) = 1
    ) AS base

FULL OUTER JOIN
    (
        SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
          AND ISDATE(fechaindustrial) = 1
    ) AS k
    ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial
   AND base.HORA = k.HORA

FULL OUTER JOIN
    (
        SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS kilos
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
          AND ISDATE(fechaindustrial) = 1
    ) AS g
    ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial
   AND base.HORA = g.hora

FULL OUTER JOIN
    (
        SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) AS humedad
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
          AND ISDATE(fechaindustrial) = 1
    ) AS h
    ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial
   AND base.HORA = h.hora

FULL OUTER JOIN
    (
        SELECT 
            fechaindustrial,
            LEFT(HORA, 2) + ':00' AS hora,
            SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) AS bolsas
        FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_especiales2
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
          AND ISDATE(fechaindustrial) = 1
        GROUP BY fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA, 2)
    ) AS e
    ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial
   AND base.HORA = e.hora

WHERE
    -- Fecha válida
    ISDATE(
        COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial)
    ) = 1

    -- Últimos 3 años hasta hoy
    AND CONVERT(date,
        COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial),
        103
    ) BETWEEN DATEADD(YEAR, -3, CAST(GETDATE() AS date))
        AND CAST(GETDATE() AS date)

ORDER BY
    CONVERT(date,
        COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial),
        103
    ) DESC,
    hora DESC;

`;

msg.payload = molienda;

return msg;

name: Molienda Ultima Hora (Laboratorio)
func:
let datosCania = `
SELECT TOP 50
    CONVERT(DATE, ml.fechaindustrial, 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    ml.numero_pesada,
    g.GRUPO,
    ml.razon_social AS caniero,
    ml.numeroanalisis AS nro_muestra,
    ml.peso_neto AS cania_bruta,
    ml.trash,
    ml.trashReal,
    ml.Polporciento,
    ml.Brixporciento,
    ml.Pureza,
    ml.Rendimiento,
    ml.RendimientoReal,
    tca.NOMBRE AS tipo_cania,
    CONVERT(DATE, ml.fecha_pesada, 103) AS fecha_pesada,
    ml.hora_pesada,
    CONVERT(DATE, ml.fecha_salida, 103) AS fecha_salida,
    ml.hora_salida,
    '' AS nromuestra2,
    ml.prepesada,
    ml.usuario,
    tc.NOMBRE AS tipo_contrato,
    ml.transporte,
    ml.chofer AS fletero,
    '' AS cosechero,
    '' AS finca,
    '' AS nombre_finca,
    ml.patente,
    ml.observaciones,
    ml.tara
FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_muestralab2 ml
LEFT JOIN v_pr_tipocontrato tc 
       ON tc.ID = ml.tipocontrato
LEFT JOIN v_pr_tipocana tca 
       ON tca.ID = ml.id_tipo_cana
LEFT JOIN v_pr_grupos g 
       ON g.idcaniero = ml.id_caniero
WHERE CONVERT(DATE, ml.fecha_pesada, 103) >= '2025-01-01'
  AND CONVERT(DATE, ml.fecha_pesada, 103) <  '2026-01-01'
ORDER BY 
    CONVERT(DATE, ml.fecha_pesada, 103) DESC,
    ml.hora_pesada DESC;

`;

msg.payload = datosCania;

return msg;

name: Insercion en MySQL
Molienda_Laboratrio-MMSQL
func:
let Consuslta = `
SELECT 
    COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial) AS fechaindustrial,
    COALESCE(k.HORA, g.hora, h.hora, e.hora) AS hora,
    COALESCE(g.kilos, 0) AS gas,
    COALESCE(k.KILOS, 0) AS kilos,
    COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) AS humedad,
    COALESCE(e.bolsas, 0) AS bolsas
FROM 
    (SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
    ) AS base
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
    ) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = k.HORA
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(kilos, 0) AS kilos
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
    ) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = g.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) AS humedad
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2 
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
    ) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = h.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial, 
            LEFT(HORA,2) + ':00' AS hora, 
            SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) AS bolsas
     FROM pr_ezi_especiales2
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
     GROUP BY fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA,2) + ':00'
    ) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = e.hora
WHERE RIGHT(
        COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial),
        4
      ) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS CHAR(4))
ORDER BY fechaindustrial DESC, hora DESC;
`;

msg.payload = Consuslta;

return msg;

name: Calidad_Azucar (Cinta larga, Cinta corta) MMSQL
func:
let Consuslta = `
SELECT
    id,
    fechaindustrial,
    codigoproceso,
    (SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4) + '-' +
     SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 4, 2) + '-' +
     SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 1, 2)) AS fecharegistro,
    HORA,
    Color,
    Turbidez,
    ROUND(Humedad * 100, 2) AS Humedad,
    ROUND(Cenizas * 100, 2) AS Cenizas,
    Granulometria_20 AS Gran_20,
    Granulometria_30 AS Gran_30,
    Sediment_Test AS sedimento,
    SO2
FROM pr_ezi_especiales
WHERE codigoproceso IN ('Cinta Corta', 'Cinta Larga', 'Embolsado')
  AND Color IS NOT NULL
  AND SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4) >= YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1

UNION ALL

SELECT
    id,
    fechaindustrial,
    codigoproceso,
    (SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4) + '-' +
     SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 4, 2) + '-' +
     SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 1, 2)) AS fecharegistro,
    HORA,
    Color,
    Turbidez,
    ROUND(Humedad * 100, 2) AS Humedad,
    ROUND(Cenizas * 100, 2) AS Cenizas,
    Gran_20,
    Gran_30,
    Sedim_Test AS sedimento,
    SO2
FROM pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE codigoproceso IN ('Embolsado', 'Crudo')
  AND Color IS NOT NULL
  AND SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4) >= YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1

ORDER BY
    fecharegistro DESC,
    HORA DESC;
`;

msg.payload = Consuslta;

return msg;

LIST CAÑEROS
query:
SELECT TOP 2000 dbo.V_CLIENTE.ID AS id_caniero,dbo.V_PERSONA.NOMBRE AS razon_social, MAX(dbo.v_pr_grupos.GRUPO) AS grupo, dbo.V_PERSONA.CUIT AS cuit
FROM         dbo.V_UD_CLIENTE RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.V_CLIENTE WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.V_UD_CLIENTE.ID = dbo.V_CLIENTE.BOEXTENSION_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.v_pr_grupos ON dbo.V_CLIENTE.ID = dbo.v_pr_grupos.idcaniero LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.V_PERSONA WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.V_CLIENTE.ENTEASOCIADO_ID = dbo.V_PERSONA.ID
-- WHERE V_PERSONA.NOMBRE LIKE '%SOTILLO%' --dbo.V_PERSONA.CUIT IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY dbo.V_PERSONA.CUIT, dbo.V_CLIENTE.ID, dbo.V_PERSONA.NOMBRE, dbo.V_CLIENTE.ACTIVESTATUS, dbo.V_UD_CLIENTE.PRODUCTOR, dbo.V_UD_CLIENTE.ID
HAVING      (dbo.V_CLIENTE.ACTIVESTATUS = 0 OR
                      dbo.V_CLIENTE.ACTIVESTATUS IS NULL) AND (dbo.V_UD_CLIENTE.PRODUCTOR = 'T')          
ORDER BY dbo.V_CLIENTE.ID DESC;

WITH datos_muestreo AS (
    SELECT 
        t.id_caniero, 
        t.razon_social, 
        t.peso_neto AS neto,
        ISNULL(t.azucarcaniertoneto, 0) + ISNULL(t.devengado2, 0) AS devengado_total,
        ISNULL(t.azucarcaniertoneto, 0) AS dev_v1,
        ISNULL(t.devengado2, 0) AS dev_v2,
        RIGHT(t.fechaindustrial, 4) AS ZAFRA,
        f.fecha AS fechafiltro,
        f.idcaniero2
    FROM dbo.pr_ezi_muestralab3 t
    INNER JOIN dbo.pr_ezi_filtro_ec f 
        ON RIGHT(t.fechaindustrial, 4) + SUBSTRING(t.fechaindustrial, 4, 2) + LEFT(t.fechaindustrial, 2) <= f.fecha
),
datos_ordenes AS (
    SELECT 
        o.id_caniero, 
        o.firma AS razon_social,
        o.zafra AS ZAFRA,
        f.fecha AS fechafiltro,
        f.idcaniero2,
        o.cantidad AS ord_emitidas_v1
    FROM dbo.pr_ezi_ordenes_azucar o
    INNER JOIN dbo.pr_ezi_filtro_ec f 
        ON RIGHT(o.fecha, 4) + SUBSTRING(o.fecha, 4, 2) + LEFT(o.fecha, 2) <= f.fecha AND o.zafra = f.zafra
    WHERE o.estado <> N'Anulada' AND (o.autorizada = N'S' OR o.autorizada IS NULL) AND tipoorden IS NULL
),
ctacte AS (
    SELECT 
        id_caniero, razon_social, 
        SUM(neto) AS neto, 
        ROUND(SUM(devengado_total) / 50, 0) AS devengado,
        ROUND(SUM(dev_v1) / 50, 0) AS dev_v1,
        ROUND(SUM(dev_v2) / 50, 0) AS dev_v2,
        ZAFRA, 
        fechafiltro, 
        idcaniero2,
        0 AS ord_emitidas_v1
    FROM datos_muestreo
    GROUP BY id_caniero, razon_social, ZAFRA, fechafiltro, idcaniero2
),
ordenes_azucar AS (
    SELECT 
        id_caniero, razon_social, 
        0 AS neto, 
        0 AS devengado, 
        0 AS dev_v1,
        0 AS dev_v2,
        ZAFRA, 
        fechafiltro, 
        idcaniero2, 
        SUM(ord_emitidas_v1) AS ord_emitidas_v1
    FROM datos_ordenes
    GROUP BY id_caniero, razon_social, ZAFRA, fechafiltro, idcaniero2
),
EC AS (
    SELECT * FROM ctacte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM ordenes_azucar
)
SELECT 
    EC.razon_social AS caniero,
    g.GRUPO,
    SUM(EC.neto) AS cania_bruta,
    SUM(EC.devengado) AS bls_totales_dev,
    SUM(EC.dev_v1) AS bls_dev_v1,
    SUM(EC.dev_v2) AS bls_dev_v2,
    SUM(EC.ord_emitidas_v1) AS ord_emitidas_v1,
    0 AS saldozafraanterior,
    SUM(EC.dev_v1 - EC.ord_emitidas_v1) AS saldobolsas_v1,
    EC.ZAFRA,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, STUFF(STUFF(EC.fechafiltro, 5, 0, '-'), 8, 0, '-')), 103) AS fechafiltro
FROM EC
INNER JOIN dbo.v_pr_grupos g ON EC.id_caniero = g.idcaniero
INNER JOIN dbo.pr_ezi_filtro_ec f ON EC.ZAFRA = f.zafra
GROUP BY 
    EC.id_caniero, EC.razon_social, EC.ZAFRA, 
    EC.fechafiltro, g.GRUPO, EC.idcaniero2, f.grupo
ORDER BY EC.ZAFRA, EC.razon_social;

WITH unicos AS (
    SELECT
        id_movimiento,
        patente,
        chofer,
        neto_cana,
        CONVERT(datetime, fecha_entrada + ' ' + ISNULL(hora_entrada, '00:00:00'), 103) AS entrada_at,
        CASE
            WHEN fecha_pesada IS NULL THEN NULL
            ELSE CONVERT(datetime, fecha_pesada + ' ' + ISNULL(hora_pesada, '00:00:00'), 103)
        END AS pesada_at,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(patente))), UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(chofer)))
            ORDER BY CONVERT(datetime, fecha_entrada + ' ' + ISNULL(hora_entrada, '00:00:00'), 103) DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM dbo.pr_ezi_movimientos
    WHERE (estado IS NULL OR estado <> 'A')
      AND numero_ingreso IS NOT NULL
      AND fecha_salida IS NULL
      AND fecha_entrada = CONVERT(varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103)
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*)                                                        AS total_camiones,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pesada_at IS NULL     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)         AS esperando_balanza,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pesada_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)         AS pesados_sin_salir,
    ISNULL(SUM(neto_cana), 0)                                      AS toneladas_cana_pendiente,
    ISNULL(AVG(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, entrada_at, GETDATE())), 0)        AS minutos_espera_promedio,
    ISNULL(MAX(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, entrada_at, GETDATE())), 0)        AS minutos_espera_max
FROM unicos
WHERE rn = 1;

// [min_kep, max_kep, min_real, max_real]

};

const nodeId = msg.topic
    || (msg.addressSpaceItems && msg.addressSpaceItems[0] && msg.addressSpaceItems[0].value);

if (!nodeId || !tagMap[nodeId]) return null;

let rawVal = msg.payload;
if (rawVal !== null && rawVal !== undefined && typeof rawVal === 'object') {
    rawVal = (rawVal.value && rawVal.value.value !== undefined) ? rawVal.value.value
           : rawVal.value !== undefined ? rawVal.value
           : rawVal;
}

const kep = parseFloat(rawVal);
if (isNaN(kep)) return null;

const varName = tagMap[nodeId];
const s = SCALING[varName];
let realVal;
if (s) {
    realVal = (kep - s[0]) / (s[1] - s[0]) * (s[3] - s[2]) + s[2];
    realVal = parseFloat(realVal.toFixed(2));
} else {
    realVal = parseFloat(kep.toFixed(2));
}

flow.set(varName, realVal);
return null;

name: CONSUMO POR HORA
query:
;WITH ConsultaBase AS (
    SELECT
        CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, base.fechaindustrial, 103), 103) AS fechaindustrial,
        base.hora,
        COALESCE(k.KILOS,   0) AS kilos,
        COALESCE(g.kilos,   0) AS gas,
        COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) AS humedad,
        COALESCE(e.bolsas,  0) AS bolsas
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
          AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
          AND KILOS > 0

        UNION

        SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
          AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
          AND KILOS > 0

        UNION

        SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
          AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
          AND humedad > 0

        UNION

        SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA, 2) + ':00' AS hora
        FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_especiales2
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
          AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
          AND CantBolsas > 0
          AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) <= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    ) AS base
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
    ) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = k.HORA
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS kilos
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
    ) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = g.hora
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) AS humedad
        FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
    ) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = h.hora
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            fechaindustrial,
            LEFT(HORA, 2) + ':00' AS hora,
            SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) AS bolsas
        FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_especiales2
        WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
          AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
        GROUP BY fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA, 2)
    ) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = e.hora
),
FechaIndustrialActual AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 fechaindustrial
    FROM ConsultaBase
    ORDER BY CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) DESC
),
MovConvertidos AS (
    SELECT
        mov.peso_neto AS cania_bruta,
        DATEADD(
            SECOND,
            DATEDIFF(SECOND, 0, CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), mov.hora_salida, 108), 108)),
            CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), mov.fecha_pesada, 103), 103)
        ) AS fecha_hora_salida
    FROM pr_ezi_movimientos mov
    WHERE
        ISDATE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), mov.fecha_pesada, 103)) = 1
        AND ISDATE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), mov.hora_salida, 108)) = 1
),
UltimoRegistro AS (
    SELECT MAX(fecha_hora_salida) AS ultima_fecha_hora
    FROM MovConvertidos
),
RangoHora AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, ultima_fecha_hora), 0) AS desde,
        DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, ultima_fecha_hora) + 1, 0) AS hasta
    FROM UltimoRegistro
),
CaniaHoraCurso AS (
    SELECT
        f.fechaindustrial,
        RIGHT('0' + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, r.hasta) AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) + ':00' AS hora,
        SUM(m.cania_bruta) AS kilos,
        0 AS gas,
        0 AS humedad,
        0 AS bolsas
    FROM MovConvertidos m
    CROSS JOIN RangoHora r
    CROSS JOIN FechaIndustrialActual f
    WHERE
        m.fecha_hora_salida >= r.desde
        AND m.fecha_hora_salida < r.hasta
    GROUP BY
        f.fechaindustrial,
        r.hasta
),
Resultado AS (
    SELECT fechaindustrial, hora, kilos, gas, humedad, bolsas
    FROM ConsultaBase

    UNION ALL

    SELECT fechaindustrial, hora, kilos, gas, humedad, bolsas
    FROM CaniaHoraCurso ch
    WHERE
        ch.kilos > 0
        AND ch.hora > (
            SELECT MAX(cb.hora)
            FROM ConsultaBase cb
            WHERE cb.fechaindustrial = ch.fechaindustrial
        )
)
SELECT
    fechaindustrial,
    hora,
    kilos,
    gas,
    humedad,
    bolsas
FROM Resultado
ORDER BY
    CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) DESC,
    hora DESC;

name: Molienda_Laboratrio-MMSQL
func:
let Consuslta = `
SELECT
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, base.fechaindustrial, 103), 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    base.hora,
    COALESCE(k.KILOS,   0) AS kilos,
    COALESCE(g.kilos,   0) AS gas,
    COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) AS humedad,
    COALESCE(e.bolsas,  0) AS bolsas
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND KILOS > 0
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND KILOS > 0
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND humedad > 0
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA, 2) + ':00' AS hora
    FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_especiales2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND CantBolsas > 0
      AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) <= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
) AS base
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = k.HORA
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS kilos
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = g.hora
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) AS humedad
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = h.hora
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        fechaindustrial,
        LEFT(HORA, 2) + ':00' AS hora,
        SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) AS bolsas
    FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_especiales2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
    GROUP BY fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA, 2)
) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = e.hora
ORDER BY
    CONVERT(DATE, base.fechaindustrial, 103) DESC,
    base.hora DESC;
`;

msg.payload = Consuslta;

return msg;

name: Insercion en MySQL
Molienda_Laboratrio-MMSQL
func:
let Consuslta = `
SELECT
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CONVERT(DATE, base.fechaindustrial, 103), 103) AS fechaindustrial,
    base.hora,
    COALESCE(k.KILOS,   0) AS kilos,
    COALESCE(g.kilos,   0) AS gas,
    COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) AS humedad,
    COALESCE(e.bolsas,  0) AS bolsas
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND KILOS > 0
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND KILOS > 0
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND humedad > 0
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA, 2) + ':00' AS hora
    FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_especiales2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
      AND RIGHT(fechaindustrial, 4) = CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4))
      AND CantBolsas > 0
      AND CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) <= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
) AS base
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Molienda'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = k.HORA
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS kilos
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Gas'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = g.hora
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fechaindustrial, HORA AS hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) AS humedad
    FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Bagazo'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = h.hora
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        fechaindustrial,
        LEFT(HORA, 2) + ':00' AS hora,
        SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) AS bolsas
    FROM CORONA.dbo.pr_ezi_especiales2
    WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado'
      AND fechaindustrial LIKE '[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9]/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]'
    GROUP BY fechaindustrial, LEFT(HORA, 2)
) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.hora = e.hora
ORDER BY
    CONVERT(DATE, base.fechaindustrial, 103) DESC,
    base.hora DESC;
`;

msg.payload = Consuslta;

return msg;
